topIngredients.name: Vitamin C (Ascorbic Acid)
topIngredients.benefit: Brightens dark circles and uneven under-eye tone

topIngredients.name: Vitamin E (Tocopherol)
topIngredients.benefit: Moisturizes and protects the delicate eye area

verdict: LilyAna offers a natural ingredient approach to eye care at an accessible price. The vitamin C and E combination addresses dark circles while aloe keeps the delicate area calm. Results visible after 4-6 weeks.
